_note: Covers the complete topic creation and post publishing pipeline. PostsController#create is the HTTP entry point; NewPostManager#perform gates approval/queuing then calls perform_create_post which instantiates PostCreator. PostCreator#create orchestrates post saving and calls create_topic (which uses TopicCreator#create) for new topics. TopicPublisher#publish! handles shared-draft-to-live publishing. Verified by grep in app/ at d73e448.
